name: nested-table-independence
description: Outer table with OuterStyle (firstRow=blue). Inner 2x2 table nested in cell (1,0) with InnerStyle (firstRow=red).
expected_behavior: Outer row 0 cells: blue (4472C4) from outer firstRow. Inner table row 0 cells: red (FF0000) from inner firstRow. Inner table row 1 cells: no conditional shading. Inner table must NOT inherit outer table's conditional formatting.
